task: Create a new connector named 'Demo CRM' with trigger_types ['record_created','status_changed'] and action_types ['create_record','update_record'] and then list all connectors to confirm it was added.
Create a new connection for the 'Demo CRM' connector with mocked authentication_metadata {"api_key":"TEST-123"} and status 'valid', then update the same connection's status to 'expired'.

Create a workflow named 'Lead to Support Sync' in 'draft' status that triggers on event_type 'record_created' from the 'Demo CRM' connector with filter_rules {"record_type":"lead"} and has a single action_step that uses the 'Helpdesk' connector to operation 'create_record' with field_mappings {"ticket_title":"New lead from {{lead.name}}","ticket_priority":"medium"}.

Update the existing workflow 'Lead to Support Sync' to status 'active' and modify its action_step field_mappings so that 'ticket_priority' is set to 'high' when {{lead.score}} > 80 using a simple conditional expression.

Create a workflow named 'Daily Summary Notification' with status 'active' that uses a trigger_config with event_type 'time_schedule' set to run every day at 18:00 UTC and a single action_step that calls the 'Notification' connector with operation 'send_notification' and field_mappings {"recipient":"ops-team@company.com","message":"Daily summary run at {{timestamp}}"}.

Use the test trigger API on the 'Lead to Support Sync' workflow with a sample payload {"record_type":"lead","name":"Acme Corp","score":92} and verify that a workflow_run is created with status 'running' or 'succeeded'.

List workflow_runs for the 'Daily Summary Notification' workflow filtered by status 'failed' and date_range from '2025-01-01T00:00:00Z' to '2025-01-31T23:59:59Z' and return only the run_ids and their status timestamps.

Retrieve all run_logs for a specific failed workflow_run with id 'wr_12345', identify the action step that has outcome 'error' with error_code 'MAPPING_INVALID', and update the corresponding workflow's action step field_mappings to fix the invalid field name from 'custmer_id' to 'customer_id'.

Pause an currently active workflow named 'High Priority Ticket Escalation', then re-run all its failed workflow_runs from the last 7 days one by one using the re-run API, and finally list the re-run results including each run_id and final status.

Create a new workflow named 'Status Change Notifier' with status 'active' that triggers on event_type 'status_changed' for the 'Demo CRM' connector when filter_rules {"new_status":"closed_won"} and has two sequential action_steps: the first uses the 'Spreadsheet' connector to operation 'create_record' with field_mappings {"sheet":"Deals","amount":"{{deal.amount}}","customer":"{{deal.name}}"}, and the second uses the 'Notification' connector with operation 'send_notification' and field_mappings {"recipient":"sales-lead@company.com","message":"Deal {{deal.name}} closed won for {{deal.amount}}"}.
